# Your Fitness Friend

> AI fitness coach that analyzes workout form through your camera, recommends exercises by muscle group, and tracks your progress over time.

Your Fitness Friend is a web app that helps people train smarter. The AI Form Coach uses your device camera to grade exercise technique in real time with a 0–100 form score and corrective cues. The app includes a library of 150+ exercises across 12 muscle groups, workout logging with sets/reps/weight, and analytics like muscle heatmaps, training volume, streaks, and recovery scoring.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how AI form analysis works.
- [Exercise Library](/exercises): Browse 150+ exercises with instructions, common mistakes, and form tips.
- [Sign In](/auth): Create an account or sign in with email or Google.
